arts.ttl: 'Highest level' – Brighton confirm first January arrival as key man joins Fabian Hurzeler's team
arts.sum: Brighton have appointed Daniel Niedzkowski as assistant head coach, who will take up the position in January.

arts.ttl: Brighton appoint Niedzkowski as assistant coach
arts.sum: Daniel Niedzkowski, head of the German football federation's coach training programme, will join Brighton in January.

arts.ttl: How Arne Slot's tactics are boosting Liverpool in Premier League title race against Manchester City, Arsenal
arts.sum: Sports Mole examines what Arne Slot has changed tactically to rescue points for Liverpool against the likes of Arsenal and Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: ‘World-class’ star Chelsea sold for peanuts would be perfect at Arsenal or Man City
arts.sum: Chelsea have been told that they have allowed a “world-class” player to slip through their fingertips, with Billy Gilmour tipped for big things at Arsenal or Manchester City . “I see a lot of him for Scotland and all the teams he’s played for and I believe that if you put him in the centre of midfield for Arsenal or Manchester City, he’d be just fine.

arts.ttl: Bemused Pep Guardiola criticises England call-up for Jack Grealish
arts.sum: Jack Grealish was called up for England duty by Lee Carsley despite missing Manchester City's last five games through injury.

arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Brighton this weekend as they look to arrest an uncharacteristic slide in form. City have lost three matches on the bounce for the first time in over six years after a heavy loss during the week to Sporting Lisbon.
